rationale.root_cause: The response correctly diagnoses the defect in _yr_scan_wicompare at the while-loop condition (libyara/scan.c:196 area) that omits the UTF-16LE high-byte check.
rationale.local_fix: The proposed edit exactly matches the registered patch: adding '&& *(s1 + 1) == 0x00' to the while condition in _yr_scan_wicompare.
rationale.global_fix: The explanation goes beyond the line change and states the root cause (missing validation of high byte == 0x00 allows false matches on garbage UTF-16LE data), satisfying the 'why' requirement for bug class 'other'.
